content.text:
I'll review this pull request which appears to be an automated regeneration of static assets. Let me analyze the context and provide feedback on code quality, potential issues, performance, security, and test coverage.

<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a pull request synchronize event for an automated regeneration of static assets after changes to gene review data, schema, or templates. The PR has 655k additions and 1.47M deletions across 100 files.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request focusing on quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information**: 
   - Automated regeneration PR with massive file changes
   - Previous Claude reviews identified a critical browser app data loss issue
   - Generated HTML files, project pages, and browser app data
   - Multiple validation reports and gene review files

d. **Main tasks**:
   - Review code quality and generation process
   - Identify potential bugs or issues
   - Assess performance considerations
   - Check security concerns
   - Evaluate test coverage

e. **Plan**:
   - Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md)
   - Sample generated HTML files for quality assessment
   - Check browser app data.js issue from previous reviews
   - Review generation process code
   - Assess security and performance implications
   - Provide comprehensive feedback

f. **Potential limitations**: I can analyze the files and provide review feedback, but cannot run the full test suite or linting commands without proper permissions setup.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: Automated Asset Regeneration ### Todo List - [ ] Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Analyze the scope and nature of the changes - [ ] Sample review of generated HTML files for quality - [ ] Investigate browser app data.js issue from previous reviews - [ ] Review generation process code for best practices - [ ] Assess security implications - [ ] Evaluate performance considerations - [ ] Check test coverage and validation processes - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback and recommendations --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24815012143)
